scripts.dev:cf: npm run build:manifest && opennextjs-cloudflare build && printf 'data/world/gallery/mp4/\ndata/archive/\n' > .open-next/assets/.assetsignore && wrangler dev
scripts.preview: npm run build:manifest && opennextjs-cloudflare build && printf 'data/world/gallery/mp4/\ndata/archive/\n' > .open-next/assets/.assetsignore && wrangler dev
scripts.deploy: R2_PUBLIC_BASE="$R2_PUBLIC_BASE" npm run build:manifest && opennextjs-cloudflare build && printf 'data/world/gallery/mp4/\ndata/archive/\n' > .open-next/assets/.assetsignore && wrangler deploy
scripts.test: for f in tests/*.test.mjs; do node "$f" || exit 1; done
